english_query: Also, the woman was made in the happy place. But the man is more great than the woman. So much more the man should have been made in the happy place.
ugf_response: The woman was made in the happy place, not because of her own great standing, but because of the great standing of the thing her body came from. For this same reason, the children would have been born in the happy place, where their parents already were.

english_query: How good I am, young man! When I ask you for one good thing, you give me a big group of them, which you keep. Let us keep the story of the group, and I ask you, What is the way of the little flying things that make sweet food? And you say there are many kinds of the little flying things that make sweet food. I say: But do the little flying things that make sweet food change as the little flying things that make sweet food, because there are many and different kinds of them; or are they not rather to be told by some other thing, like being pretty, big, or shaped a certain way? How would you answer me?
ugf_response: I should answer that the little flying things that make sweet food do not change from one another, as the little flying things that make sweet food.

Then now is the time, bright young one, for me to look into this, and for you to show what you know; since although the man who teaches about shapes has said good things about many people from the city and from other lands in my hearing, never did I hear him say good things about anyone as he has been saying good things about you.

english_query: Also, no bad thing is good: 'Bad things happen to you who call bad things good and good things bad'. But some things are called bad. So not every thing that is, is good.
ugf_response: No thing that is, is called bad because it is a thing, but only because it is missing some part of being. So a man is called bad because he is missing some good way of acting; and an eye is called bad because it is missing the power to see well.

english_query: So are the good and the bad good and bad in about the same way, or do the bad have the better part in both good and bad things? (That is, in having more fun and more hurt.)
ugf_response: I really do not know what you mean.

english_query: It looks like in god nothing is bad or not perfect. But it looks not perfect for a person who lead a land to lead by using other people; so a person who lead a land, because he cannot do all things himself and cannot be in all places at the same time, must lead by help from other people. So god lead all things right away.
ugf_response: That a person who lead a land has help to do the things he says people should do is a sign not only that he is not perfect but also that he is important; because by the order of help the power of the person who lead a land is shown more.

english_query: Also, if you say that making things comes from a part of what God is that belongs to one Person, this is not enough; because every thing God does comes from every part of what God is--like his strong power, his being good, and his mind that thinks well--and so it does not belong to one more than another. So we should not say one way of making things belongs to one Person more than another, unless we say they are different in making things because of how they are tied and come from each other.
ugf_response: Even though every thing God does comes from each part of what he is, each thing is tied to the part it fits best with; so the way things are set up is tied to 'mind that thinks well,' and helping a bad person be right is tied to 'being kind' and 'being good' given in a big way. But making something be, which is making the thing itself, is tied to 'strong power.'

english_query: And is not that, the old teacher, said in a good way?
ugf_response: Good! yes; but wait a bit and hear me talk, and then you will say it with more reason; because to think true is good and to be made not true is bad.

english_query: It seems the first man did not have all good ways. For some good ways hold back strong feelings: like holding back too much want, or holding back too much fear. But in the time before he did wrong, feelings were not too strong. So those good ways were not there then.
ugf_response: It is only by chance that these good ways fight strong feelings, because they are in a person who happens to have strong feelings. But these good ways are able by what they are to keep feelings right.

english_query: There will be no hard part, old teacher, in answering your question. Let us take first the good way of a man--he should know how to run the city, and in running it to help his friends and hurt those who want to hurt him; and he must also be careful not to get hurt himself. The good way of a woman, if you wish to know about that, may also be easily said: her job is to order her home, and keep what is inside, and do what her husband says. Every time, every way of life, young or old, boy or girl, one who is owned or one who is free, has a different good way: there are many good ways, and no end of ways to say them; for good way is about the things we do and who we are in all that we do. And the same may be said of bad way, old teacher.
ugf_response: How lucky I am, young man! When I ask you for one good way, you give me a big group of them, which are in your keeping. Suppose that I keep the picture of the big group, and ask of you, What is the way of the little flying thing that makes sweet food? and you answer that there are many kinds of them, and I reply: But do the little flying things that make sweet food change as little flying things that make sweet food, because there are many and different kinds of them; or are they not rather to be told from each other by some other thing, as for how they look, how big they are, or their shape? How would you answer me?

english_query: Also, the great old church teacher said true means being like the start. But god is not like a start. So god is not true.
ugf_response: Our mind is true when it is the same as the things it learns from. Things are true when they are the same as their maker, which is the mind of god. But this does not fit the truth of god, unless we talk about the Son, who has a start. If we talk about the truth of god in what he is, we must say he is like the start because he is not from another. So the truth of god can be called like the start, because his being is not different from his mind.

english_query: Also, the life of doing is said to be not the same as the life of thinking. But the life of thinking is only different from the life of doing by some acts. So life is an act.
ugf_response: By acts of life we mean those whose start is inside the one who does them, and by which the one who does them makes such acts by himself. It is true that in men there are not just the born starts of some acts, which are their born powers, but something more than these, like ways of being that make them want to do certain acts as if by a second way, so that the acts bring good feel. So, like a picture, any work in which a man finds good feel, so that his wish is for it, his time is spent on it, and his whole life is set for it, is called the life of that man. So some are said to live a life of bad want, others a life of good. In this way the life of thinking is not the same as the life of doing, and so to know God is called life forever. So the answer to the third point is clear.

english_query: Also, bad is the not having of right way, right kind, and right order. But bad is not the not having of all good. So what good really is is not made of right way, right kind, and right order.
ugf_response: Every thing is because of some shape. So, for every thing that a thing is, it has a right way, right kind, and right order. Like a man has a right way, right kind, and right order as he is white, good, and knows much; for every thing said about him. But bad takes away some part of being, like not seeing takes away the being of sight; yet it does not take away every right way, right kind, and right order, but only those that come with the being of sight.

english_query: Are his words right and does the talk say we are wrong when we look for bad idea before we find what one knows; that must be found first then the way of bad idea?
ugf_response: I can only say the same as you, the old teacher, up to now we have come.

english_query: Also, the mind only sees things that are inside it by what they are. But things made of stuff cannot get inside the soul of a man or the mind of a spirit from god by what they are. So the mind cannot see them, but only by picture seeing, which catches the look of bodies, or by sense seeing, which looks at bodies as they are. Now spirits from god do not have picture seeing or sense seeing, but only mind seeing. So spirits from god cannot know things made of stuff.
ugf_response: Sense does not catch what things are, but only how they look on the outside. In the same way, picture seeing does not; for it catches only the look of bodies. Only the mind catches what things are. So it is said that the mind looks at what a thing is, and it does not go wrong about this; just as sense does not go wrong about what it senses. So what things made of stuff are is in the mind of men and spirits from god, as the thing known is in the one who knows, and not by their real way of being. But some things are in the mind or soul by both ways; and in either case there is mind seeing.

english_query: Also, the great old church teacher says that bad spirits make certain things happen by using hidden moves on certain small starts, which they know are in matter. But bodies, not powers, can be used with moving from one place to another. So it is not right to say that there are starting powers in body matter.
ugf_response: These doing and taking powers are in certain parts of body things: and when they are used with moving from one place to another to make certain things happen, we say the bad spirits are using small starts.

english_query: Also, the thing that makes something happen is the maker of it in all places. But different things that go with different powers also go with one power; like sound and color go with seeing and hearing, which are different powers, yet they fall under the one power of sense. So the powers are not told as different by the different things they work on.
ugf_response: The higher power looks at a wider way of the thing than the lower power; because the higher a power is, the more things it covers. So many things are joined in the one way of the thing, which the higher power looks at by itself; while they are not the same in the ways looked at by the lower powers by themselves. This is how different things go with different lower powers; which things, however, are under one higher power.

english_query: It looks like love is not in god. Because there are no strong feelings in god. But love is a strong feeling. So love is not in god.
ugf_response: The part of us that wants things moves the body, and this move often changes our body, like in the heart. We call these body-changing moves 'strong feelings'. But the part of us that chooses what is good does not always change the body. Love can be a move of this choosing part. When love is just a choice of the good mind, it is not a strong feeling. It is in this way that god loves, without any strong feeling.

english_query: Also, the soul is what makes a thing be what it is. So if the soul is made by God, then all other things that make things be what they are are also made by God. This means no such things come from growing; but this is not right.
ugf_response: As we said, the soul that can think is not the same as other things that make things be what they are.
